ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_signs" (
  "sign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic sign */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the traffic sign (e.g., Dangerous warning) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the traffic sign (e.g., Priority, Prohibitory) */,
  "images" INTEGER /* Number of images available for the traffic sign */,
  "total_images" INTEGER /* Total number of images associated with the traffic sign for training */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the traffic sign */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the traffic sign */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the traffic sign location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the traffic sign location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recognition_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recognition model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., Original_model_52) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose and usage */,
  "environment_condition" TEXT /* Environmental condition for which the model is optimized (e.g., day, night, fog) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy percentage of the model recognition */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Number of training data points used to train the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recognition model used */,
  "sign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic sign assessed */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy percentage of the model recognition */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Original, fog, night) */,
  "environment_condition" TEXT /* Environmental condition when the accuracy was measured */,
  "test_data_size" INTEGER /* Number of test data points used to evaluate the model */,
  "false_positives" INTEGER /* Number of false positive recognitions */,
  "false_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of false negative recognitions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_sign_id FOREIGN KEY ("sign_id") REFERENCES traffic_signs ("sign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES recognition_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "sign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic sign associated with the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path or URL to the image of the traffic sign */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., daytime, nighttime, foggy) */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_sign_id FOREIGN KEY ("sign_id") REFERENCES traffic_signs ("sign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, model developer, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., data analytics, model development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table accessed by the user (e.g., traffic_signs, model_performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "sign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic sign being assessed for compliance */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sign is compliant (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "compliance_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding compliance status or issues */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance audit */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_sign_id FOREIGN KEY ("sign_id") REFERENCES traffic_signs ("sign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail record */,
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compliance record being audited */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New compliance status after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_compliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_id") REFERENCES regulatory_compliance ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
